title: Timeline + Duration Combo & Work Schedule
excerpt: The Timeline + Duration Combo doesnt take into account the work schedules, which would make this combo really accurate and a real powerhouse. Please can you add this to the roadmap?

posts.author: samjtaylor (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: The Timeline + Duration Combo doesnt take into account the work schedules, which would make this combo really accurate and a real powerhouse. Please can you add this to the roadmap?

posts.author: DrewBeFree (Drew Webb)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! Factoring in the account wide Public Holidays in the duration is crucial to getting an accurate output.
